mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT chat_id, user_id FROM user_chats WHERE chat_id = #{id} )

SELECT DISTINCT c.chat_id FROM user_chats c JOIN public.bot_user bu on c.user_id = bu.id JOIN public.notification_subscriptions ns on bu.id = ns.user_id JOIN public.notification_topic nt on ns.topic_id = nt.topic_id WHERE nt.name = #{topicName} AND bu.access_level >= nt.min_access_level
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_chats (chat_id, user_id) VALUES (#{chatId}, #{userId}) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
